# CWE-640: Weak Password Recovery Mechanism for Forgotten Password
lang: go
file: CWE-640-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type User struct {
	ID       uint
	Email    string
	Password string
}

// Vulnerable: resets password using only the email address as proof of identity.
func ForgotPassword(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	email := c.PostForm("email")
	newPass := c.PostForm("new_password")
	result := db.Model(&User{}).Where("email = ?", email).Update("password", newPass)
	if result.RowsAffected == 0 {
		c.Status(http.StatusNotFound)
		return
	}
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
